summary: Tested pagination implementation across 5 user-facing pages (Orders, Marketplace, GiftVoucherRedemption, BillPayments, ReferralEarningsHistory). All pages have correct pagination logic implemented. Fixed 1 bug (duplicate 'Next' text in BillPayments.js) and added missing data-testid attributes to GiftVoucherRedemption and BillPayments pagination buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 pages have correct pagination implementation with currentPage state, itemsPerPage constant, and conditional rendering when items exceed page limit
Marketplace.js: itemsPerPage=12, data-testid='marketplace-prev-page' and 'marketplace-next-page', correctly resets page on filter/search change
BillPayments.js: itemsPerPage=10, added data-testid='bill-payments-prev-page' and 'bill-payments-next-page', fixed duplicate 'Next' text bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pagination is implemented correctly on all 5 pages. Pagination controls only appear when items exceed itemsPerPage threshold (10-15 items depending on page). During testing, all pages showed empty states or fewer items than the threshold, so pagination controls were not visible. The code implementation is verified correct through code review. All pagination buttons now have data-testid attributes for testing.

orders_page.note: Empty state shown during test - no orders for admin user

marketplace_page.note: 10 products shown - below threshold of 12, pagination not visible

gift_vouchers_page.note: Empty state shown during test - no voucher requests

bill_payments_page.note: Empty state shown during test - no bill payment requests

referral_earnings_page.note: Empty state shown during test - no referral earnings

enhancements_made.enhancement: Added data-testid='gift-vouchers-prev-page' and 'gift-vouchers-next-page' to pagination buttons
Added data-testid='bill-payments-prev-page' and 'bill-payments-next-page' to pagination buttons
